overview: A full-featured multi-category e-commerce marketplace inspired by Temu. Includes a user storefront with product discovery, cart, checkout, reviews, wishlists, and order history — plus a powerful admin panel with analytics, inventory management, order management, coupon/discount tools, and sales reports. Supports Stripe, PayPal, and MTN MOMO payments.
features: Multi-category product catalog (Electronics & Gadgets, Fashion & Apparel)
User storefront with search, filters, sorting, and recommendations
Shopping cart, promo codes, and multi-payment checkout (Stripe, PayPal, MTN MOMO)
Product reviews and star ratings with moderation
Wishlists, order history, and user accounts
Admin dashboard with analytics, revenue charts, and KPI metrics
Admin product management with bulk operations and inventory tracking
Admin order management with status updates and CSV export
Discount and coupon management with flash sales support
Modern minimalist responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
